tasks.label: Bundle
tasks.command: cd drawdown_rust && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../out/rust_wasm && cd .. && rm -f out/rust_wasm/.gitignore && rm -rf out/dotnet_publish out/dotnet_wasm out/go_wasm && dotnet publish drawdown_dotnet/DrawdownDotNet.csproj -c Release -o out/dotnet_publish && cp -R out/dotnet_publish/wwwroot out/dotnet_wasm && mkdir -p out/go_wasm && cd drawdown_go && GOOS=js GOARCH=wasm go build -ldflags "-s -w" -o ../out/go_wasm/montecarlo.wasm && cd .. && cp "$(go env GOROOT)/lib/wasm/wasm_exec.js" out/go_wasm/wasm_exec.js && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/monteCarlo.bundle.js monteCarloApp.tsx && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/monteCarlo.worker.js monteCarloWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/rustMonteCarloWorker.js rustMonteCarloWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/rustMonteCarloShardWorker.js rustMonteCarloShardWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/monteCarloAnalysisWorker.js monteCarloAnalysisWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/dotNetMonteCarloWorker.js dotNetMonteCarloWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/dotNetMonteCarloShardWorker.js dotNetMonteCarloShardWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/goMonteCarloWorker.js goMonteCarloWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/goMonteCarloShardWorker.js goMonteCarloShardWorker.ts
